entity.summary: China-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange that suspended deposits and withdrawals in August 2022. The original domain and normal markets have not returned to verifiable operation, while no formal terminal closure notice establishes a death date.
entity.notes: Classified inactive rather than dead because available evidence supports prolonged non-operation but not a formal permanent closure marker.

changes.summary: China-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange that suspended deposits and withdrawals in August 2022. The original domain and normal markets have not returned to verifiable operation, while no formal terminal closure notice establishes a death date.
changes.notes: Classified inactive rather than dead because available evidence supports prolonged non-operation but not a formal permanent closure marker.

evidence.title: ZB.com suspended deposit and withdrawal services
evidence.notes: Official notice announced suspension of deposits and withdrawals; archive-first access is required because the former domain is unavailable.
